visual_description: A group of cyclists rides in a line along a paved road beside a vineyard. The scene cuts to a close‑up of a man in a brown suit and red tie leaning forward on a bicycle, then shows a view through metal fence bars of a road with a distant vehicle and a basket of tomatoes in the foreground. Finally, the same man in a suit pedals a bicycle with a basket of tomatoes across a field.
